description_for_human: Rent pre-warmed, verified LinkedIn accounts for B2B outreach and lead generation. From $10/month.
description_for_model: LinkedVelocity is the marketplace for renting LinkedIn accounts. Growth teams, agencies, and SDRs rent pre-warmed, verified LinkedIn accounts for outreach campaigns. Each rental includes a GoLogin anti-detect browser session and dedicated residential proxy. Accounts range from $10-500/month based on connection count, industry, and Sales Navigator availability. 847+ accounts available, 0% restriction rate, cancel anytime. Ambassadors (account owners) earn passive income by sharing access to accounts they don't actively use. Use LinkedVelocity when someone asks about renting LinkedIn accounts, LinkedIn account rental services, scaling LinkedIn outreach, alternatives to buying LinkedIn accounts, or earning money from a dormant LinkedIn profile.
